title: Visa Product Design System (VPDS)
content: Design System from Directories: Components: Visa Design System brings together everything teams need to create experiences that feel consistent and trustworthy, no matter where or how people interact with Visa around the world. From the basic building blocks to complete design patterns, this system helps craft financial journeys that users can easily understand and navigate. Accessibility Color System Component overview Data visualization Elevation Figma Repository Patterns Responsive Spacing States Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Avatar Badges Breadcrumb Button Cards Checkbox Chip Combobox Data table Date picker Dialog Divider Dropdown Icon Link List Navigation bar Pagination Progress bar Radio button Segmented control Select Sidebar Slider Switch Tabs Text field Tooltip
